flashcards.definition: Name the cation (from base) + anion (from acid): NaOH + HCl → sodium chloride.
Table salt; from NaOH + HCl neutralization.
A salt from Ca(OH)₂ + H₂SO₄; used in plaster.
A salt from KOH + HNO₃; used in fertilizers and fireworks.
A salt from NH₃ + HCl; used in dry cell batteries.
